news.title: NK Securities Research Pvt Ltd bought 844,002 shares of Titagarh at avg price ₹705.55.
news.summary: NK Securities Research Pvt Ltd bought 844,002 shares of Titagarh at avg price ₹705.55.

news.title:
Jump Trading Financial India bought 1,250,723 shares of Titagarh Rail Systems.
The weighted average trade price for the transaction was Rs 704.9 per share.
news.summary:
Jump Trading Financial India bought 1,250,723 shares of Titagarh Rail Systems.
The weighted average trade price for the transaction was Rs 704.9 per share.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail shares jumped 12% after its subsidiary secured approval for a ₹610 crore expansion project.
Jefferies initiated coverage with a 'buy' rating and ₹810 target, citing strong passenger segment growth.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail shares jumped 12% after its subsidiary secured approval for a ₹610 crore expansion project.
Jefferies initiated coverage with a 'buy' rating and ₹810 target, citing strong passenger segment growth.

news.title:
Titagarh Naval Systems gets In-Principle Approval for shipbuilding expansion; IRFC sanctions Rs 1,000 crore loan to MAHAGENCO.
Aurobindo Pharma reports positive Phase 3 trial results; Deep Industries wins ONGC contract worth Rs 59 crore.
news.summary:
Titagarh Naval Systems gets In-Principle Approval for shipbuilding expansion; IRFC sanctions Rs 1,000 crore loan to MAHAGENCO.
Aurobindo Pharma reports positive Phase 3 trial results; Deep Industries wins ONGC contract worth Rs 59 crore.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail's subsidiary gets approval for INR 610 cr Falta shipyard expansion.
Govt subsidy of INR 129 cr supports India's shipbuilding development scheme.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail's subsidiary gets approval for INR 610 cr Falta shipyard expansion.
Govt subsidy of INR 129 cr supports India's shipbuilding development scheme.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail gains attention as it receives a 'Buy' rating amidst focus on railway stocks.
Jupiter Wagons also highlighted with an outlook update in recent business news.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail gains attention as it receives a 'Buy' rating amidst focus on railway stocks.
Jupiter Wagons also highlighted with an outlook update in recent business news.

news.title:
Jefferies initiates Buy on Titagarh Rail with a target price of ₹810.
The rating reflects strong order visibility, growth in rail/metro manufacturing, and better execution outlook.
news.summary:
Jefferies initiates Buy on Titagarh Rail with a target price of ₹810.
The rating reflects strong order visibility, growth in rail/metro manufacturing, and better execution outlook.

news.title:
Jefferies sees a 32% upside for Titagarh Rail due to strong passenger rail growth and Vande Bharat expansion.
Jupiter Wagons rated Underperform; 22% downside flagged due to slower wagon growth and stretched valuations.
news.summary:
Jefferies sees a 32% upside for Titagarh Rail due to strong passenger rail growth and Vande Bharat expansion.
Jupiter Wagons rated Underperform; 22% downside flagged due to slower wagon growth and stretched valuations.

news.title:
Experts recommend holding Asian Paints and Dixon Tech short-term, citing oil price impacts and ECMS competition.
Biocon, BSE, DAM Capital, and Titagarh Rail receive buy or hold advice with key price levels highlighted for potential gains.
news.summary:
Experts recommend holding Asian Paints and Dixon Tech short-term, citing oil price impacts and ECMS competition.
Biocon, BSE, DAM Capital, and Titagarh Rail receive buy or hold advice with key price levels highlighted for potential gains.

news.title:
CRISIL reaffirmed Titagarh Rail's long-term rating at CRISIL AA/Stable.
Short-term rating was maintained at CRISIL A1, indicating strong credit quality.
news.summary:
CRISIL reaffirmed Titagarh Rail's long-term rating at CRISIL AA/Stable.
Short-term rating was maintained at CRISIL A1, indicating strong credit quality.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail Systems secures a ₹226.4 crore order, boosting its order book.
The order enhances Titagarh's near-term execution pipeline.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail Systems secures a ₹226.4 crore order, boosting its order book.
The order enhances Titagarh's near-term execution pipeline.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail Systems received LOI from JSW Port Logistics for 720 wagons.
The order is expected to be executed within 6 months of the effective date.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail Systems received LOI from JSW Port Logistics for 720 wagons.
The order is expected to be executed within 6 months of the effective date.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail Systems to sell 100% of dormant unit, Titagarh Singapore, to Worldvmc Singapore for $154,707.
The transaction is expected to be completed by June 30, 2026.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail Systems to sell 100% of dormant unit, Titagarh Singapore, to Worldvmc Singapore for $154,707.
The transaction is expected to be completed by June 30, 2026.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail secures Rs 44.4-cr order to supply rakes for HR coil transport on Indian Railways.
Q3 FY26 net profit dipped 23.5% YoY to Rs 48.03 cr; shares rose 2.1% to Rs 628.6 on BSE.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail secures Rs 44.4-cr order to supply rakes for HR coil transport on Indian Railways.
Q3 FY26 net profit dipped 23.5% YoY to Rs 48.03 cr; shares rose 2.1% to Rs 628.6 on BSE.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail Systems Ltd received a Letter of Intent for providing 2 BFNS 22.9T rakes on lease to Indian Railways for 10 years.
The order, valued at ₹44.41 Cr (incl. GST), was awarded by Balmer Lawrie & Co. Ltd under the Wagon Leasing Business.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail Systems Ltd received a Letter of Intent for providing 2 BFNS 22.9T rakes on lease to Indian Railways for 10 years.
The order, valued at ₹44.41 Cr (incl. GST), was awarded by Balmer Lawrie & Co. Ltd under the Wagon Leasing Business.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail Systems' ₹13,955 Cr order book is 77% driven by its Passenger Rail segment, aligning with India's railway modernization efforts.
Shares rose 3.3% to ₹642.35. TRSL holds 25% wagon market share and focuses on rail mobility, defense, and shipbuilding.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail Systems' ₹13,955 Cr order book is 77% driven by its Passenger Rail segment, aligning with India's railway modernization efforts.
Shares rose 3.3% to ₹642.35. TRSL holds 25% wagon market share and focuses on rail mobility, defense, and shipbuilding.

news.title:
BHEL to invest Rs 3,064.5 crore in Coal India JV for coal-to-chemicals; JV to develop 2,000 TPD Ammonium Nitrate plant.
BHEL also forms JV with Titagarh Rail for Vande Bharat train maintenance; Q3 net profit triples to Rs 390.4 crore.
news.summary:
BHEL to invest Rs 3,064.5 crore in Coal India JV for coal-to-chemicals; JV to develop 2,000 TPD Ammonium Nitrate plant.
BHEL also forms JV with Titagarh Rail for Vande Bharat train maintenance; Q3 net profit triples to Rs 390.4 crore.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail Systems' associate Firema sold its business unit to Fabbrica Italiana Treni for EUR 66M.
The transfer aids Firema's debt repayment; no impact on Titagarh's operations or shareholding reported.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail Systems' associate Firema sold its business unit to Fabbrica Italiana Treni for EUR 66M.
The transfer aids Firema's debt repayment; no impact on Titagarh's operations or shareholding reported.

news.title:
India's ₹16 lakh crore high-speed rail project boosts railway stocks, with Titagarh Rail Systems, BEML, and Jupiter Wagons set to benefit.
Titagarh focuses on passenger rail, Jupiter expands wheelset capacity, and BEML readies high-speed train facilities for future demand.
news.summary:
India's ₹16 lakh crore high-speed rail project boosts railway stocks, with Titagarh Rail Systems, BEML, and Jupiter Wagons set to benefit.
Titagarh focuses on passenger rail, Jupiter expands wheelset capacity, and BEML readies high-speed train facilities for future demand.

news.title:
Titagarh Rail Systems has disclosed its Q3 & 9MFY26 earnings call transcript.
The transcript is available on the company's website for public reference.
news.summary:
Titagarh Rail Systems has disclosed its Q3 & 9MFY26 earnings call transcript.
